mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId , c.note_id AS noteId , c.user_id AS userId , c.parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId , c.group_id AS groupId , c.depth , c.content , c.created_at AS createdAt , c.updated_at AS updatedAt , c.is_deleted AS isDeleted , u.name AS userName , u.login_id AS loginId FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.note_id = #{noteId} ORDER BY c.group_id ASC , c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId , c.note_id AS noteId , c.user_id AS userId , c.parent_comment_id AS parentCommentId , c.group_id AS groupId , c.depth , c.content , c.created_at AS createdAt , c.updated_at AS updatedAt , c.is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM comment WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 'Y' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 'Y' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE comment SET is_deleted = 'Y' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
